'''Reh'mwa''' was a [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] radical and a leader of the [[True Victory Party]], a group of Bothans who tried to continue the [[ar'krai]] against the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. As of [[35 ABY/Legends|35 ABY]], he and his fellow fundamentalists had acquired a ship, the ''[[Avengeance]]'', in a bid to locate [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] and wipe out the Yuuzhan Vong. Their efforts were unsuccessful, with the ''Avengeance'' neutralized and most of his crew imprisoned in [[MaxSec Eight]].

In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], Reh'mwa began again threatening the Yuuzhan Vong and the [[Dhuryam]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Reh'mwa, along with several other members of the True Victory Party, was later killed by [[Lumiya]] on the request of [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] after the death of the World Brain.
